verses.translationText: Who have made the Qur'an into portions.
So by your Lord, We will surely question them all
About what they used to do.

verses.arabicText: فَٱصْدَعْ بِمَا تُؤْمَرُ وَأَعْرِضْ عَنِ ٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ
verses.translationText: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists.
Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers

verses.arabicText: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْعَلُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۚ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.translationText: Who make [equal] with Allah another deity. But they are going to know.

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ
verses.translationText: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.

verses.arabicText: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّٰجِدِينَ
verses.translationText: So exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him].
And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty (death).

verses.arabicText: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَتَىٰٓ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُوهُ ۚ سُبْحَٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.translationText: The command of Allah is coming, so be not impatient for it. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.

verses.arabicText: يُنَزِّلُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ بِٱلرُّوحِ مِنْ أَمْرِهِۦ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦٓ أَنْ أَنذِرُوٓا۟ أَنَّهُۥ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱتَّقُونِ
verses.translationText: He sends down the angels, with the inspiration of His command, upon whom He wills of His servants, [telling them], "Warn that there is no deity except Me; so fear Me."

verses.arabicText: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ تَعَٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.translationText: He created the heavens and earth in truth. High is He above what they associate with Him.

verses.arabicText: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ مِن نُّطْفَةٍۢ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.translationText: He created man from a sperm-drop; then at once, he is a clear adversary.

verses.arabicText: وَٱلْأَنْعَٰمَ خَلَقَهَا ۗ لَكُمْ فِيهَا دِفْءٌۭ وَمَنَٰفِعُ وَمِنْهَا تَأْكُلُونَ
verses.translationText: And the grazing livestock He has created for you; in them is warmth and [numerous] benefits, and from them you eat.

verses.arabicText: وَلَكُمْ فِيهَا جَمَالٌ حِينَ تُرِيحُونَ وَحِينَ تَسْرَحُونَ
verses.translationText: And for you in them is [the enjoyment of] beauty when you bring them in [for the evening] and when you send them out [to pasture].
